description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, surrounded by a rectangular yard enclosed by a dark boundary wall. The house features large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The front yard is landscaped with manicured hedges, small trees, and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The backyard includes a spacious patio area, a swimming pool, and a detached covered structure, possibly a carport or outdoor lounge. The exterior is predominantly white with gray accents, and the property is dotted with mature trees for shade and privacy. The overall layout emphasizes open spaces, clean lines, and functional outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio. The design is minimalist with white and gray tones, surrounded by trees and a dark boundary wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, manicured hedges, and a clear path leading to the house, with large windows and a flat roof visible.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, and a detached covered structure, with mature trees providing shade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the house, extensive windows, and the landscaped yard with a patio area.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open backyard, paved areas, and the integration of greenery and outdoor living spaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide glass door, paved steps, and minimalist landscaping; no porch or columns, emphasizing clean lines and openness.
